store_headline: Live Music WordPress Theme for Bands
store_subheadline: Showcase your band's live energy with concert photography layouts and full music features
features: Event listing and tour date functionality
Advanced playlist manager with custom audio players
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation
Portfolio custom post type for showcasing projects and collaborations
WooCommerce integration for merchandise and music sales
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: Full-bleed live concert photography with brushstroke typography — the warm organic rock aesthetic for touring bands
Warm earthy tones distinguish Bronze from dark competitors — rock energy without aggression or intimidation
Portfolio section built for band history, press coverage, and project collaborations — not just releases
Complete WPBakery music feature set: discography, audio playlists, tour dates, video galleries, wishlist, and WooCommerce merch
Currency switcher supports international touring bands selling merch to fans across regions
Band-on-stage visual identity signals live music credibility the moment the page loads
Distinct from solo-artist themes in every visual choice — built for collective band energy, not individual branding
key_benefits: Showcase live energy with concert photography and brushstroke typography
Build a band website with warm, organic rock energy
Attract bookings and press with portfolio layouts for band history
Sell merch to international fans with built-in currency switching for touring acts
Promote tour dates, releases, and a merch store within one live-performance identity
Launch with a full band feature set: discography, events, videos, and wishlist
design_features: Multiple band-oriented homepage templates with live concert photography
Dynamic, energetic layouts built around performance imagery
Album and release showcase with audio player
Custom music player with playlist support
